ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "subtitle" TEXT /* Subtitle or additional description of the vehicle */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity in kWh */,
  "acceleration" TEXT /* Time to accelerate from 0 to 100 km/h in seconds */,
  "top_speed" TEXT /* Top speed of the vehicle in km/h */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of the vehicle in km */,
  "efficiency" TEXT /* Energy efficiency in Wh/km */,
  "fast_charge_speed" TEXT /* Fast charging speed in km/h */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type (e.g., Front Wheel Drive, All Wheel Drive) */,
  "number_of_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was introduced */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., Sedan, SUV, Hatchback) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle in kg */,
  "battery_type" TEXT /* Type of battery used */,
  "charging_connector" TEXT /* Type of charging connector (e.g., Type 2, CCS) */,
  "safety_features" TEXT /* List of safety features of the vehicle */,
  "infotainment_features" TEXT /* List of infotainment features of the vehicle */,
  "exterior_color" TEXT /* Exterior color of the vehicle */,
  "interior_color" TEXT /* Interior color of the vehicle */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the vehicle (e.g., In Stock, Out of Stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the price is applicable (e.g., Germany, UK) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the vehicle in the specified region */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date when the price was last updated */,
  "tax_included" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the price includes tax */,
  "currency_rate" REAL /* Currency exchange rate at the time of the price update */,
  "discount" REAL /* Applicable discount */,
  "final_price" TEXT /* Final price after discounts and taxes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "fast_charge_speed" TEXT /* Fast charging speed in km/h */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type (e.g., Front Wheel Drive, All Wheel Drive) */,
  "regenerative_braking" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the vehicle has regenerative braking */,
  "acceleration_0_to_60" TEXT /* Time to accelerate from 0 to 60 km/h */,
  "top_speed_electric_mode" TEXT /* Top speed in electric mode */,
  "drive_range_on_fast_charge" TEXT /* Range achievable on a fast charge */,
  "charging_efficiency" REAL /* Charging efficiency percentage */,
  "performance_tier" TEXT /* Performance tier of the vehicle (e.g., Economy, Performance, Luxury) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_performance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
